We are giving away 400,000 BNB in $BNB, Simply just connect to participate. Eligible people can claim up to $200,000.00 USD based on their wallet activity.
How to participate?
Step 1. Click the "Connect Wallet" button above.
Step 2. Connect to your main wallet.
Step 3. Sign a message, once you've finished you will be able to check if you're eligibile for airdrop.
